package.name: go2_bringup
package.description:
Go2-specific hardware adapter and bringup package.
go2_hw_bridge node: - Converts SportModeState (Go2 proprioceptive state) to nav_msgs/Odometry and TF odom → base_footprint. - Converts geometry_msgs/Twist (from Nav2) to Unitree sport API Move commands published on /api/sport/request. - cmd_vel watchdog: sends StopMove if Nav2 stops publishing for cmd_timeout seconds. - Publishes robot_common_interfaces/RobotStatus at 1 Hz.
All other packages are robot-agnostic.
External build dep: nlohmann-json3-dev (MIT licence) sudo apt install nlohmann-json3-dev
TODO(agibot): Create agibot_d1_bringup with the same launch/config structure.
